verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Strengthen me to stand faithfully Change my heart that I may learn how to love Thee Guide my feet to walk in victory And do Thy perfect will faithfully

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Faithful and true I want to be to you To do Your perfect will, yielded and still A vessel you can use, filled with your virtues And though broken you’ll remold me till Your image You behold

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Not my will but Thine, for this cause I came My life is not mine, I’ve been bought with a price So I surrender my all, a willing sacrifice Your eternal purpose I will take and my freewill lay aside
